name: Black Rice
shortDescription: Premium black rice for colourful bowls, meal prep, festive serving, and modern everyday pantry use.
description: Agree Superfoods Black Rice brings whole-grain depth, naturally dark colour, and a rich nutty profile to daily meals.
fullDescription: Black rice is a naturally pigmented whole grain known for its deep purple-black colour and satisfying bite. The grain keeps a premium yet familiar pantry identity, making it easy to use in everyday lunches, dinner bowls, and special-occasion plating.

Agree Superfoods presents black rice as a practical pantry essential with clear cooking guidance and versatile meal use. The dark colour is linked to naturally occurring anthocyanin pigments in the outer layer of the grain, while the whole-grain format supports balanced meal planning.
benefits: Naturally pigmented whole grain with anthocyanin-rich outer bran
Nutty flavour and pleasant chewy texture for bowls, salads, and rice plates
A premium pantry option that adds colour and variety to regular meals
usageIdeas: Serve as a base for grain bowls with vegetables, paneer, tofu, or dals
Use in pulao-style cooking, warm salads, and festive rice platters
Meal-prep cooked portions for weekday lunch and dinner planning
bestFor: Customers looking for a whole-grain rice alternative with visual appeal
Home kitchens building variety beyond standard white rice routines
Retail and gifting assortments focused on premium pantry essentials

productDetails.label: Cooking guide
productDetails.value: Rinse well and cook 1 cup rice with 2.25 cups water for 30 to 35 minutes

productDetails.label: Prep tip
productDetails.value: Optional 20 to 30 minute soak helps softer texture and even cooking

productDetails.label: Storage
productDetails.value: Store sealed in a cool, dry place away from moisture and direct sunlight

images.alt: Agree Superfoods black rice product pack

highlights.title: Grain profile
highlights.description: Keeps bran and natural character for a fuller rice experience.

highlights.title: Natural colour
highlights.description: Dark hue comes from naturally occurring anthocyanin pigments.

highlights.title: Kitchen use
highlights.description: Works for meal prep bowls, rice plates, and premium table presentation.

faqs.question: Is black rice the same as wild rice?
faqs.answer: No. Black rice and wild rice are different grains. This product is true black rice with a naturally dark colour and nutty profile.

faqs.question: Do I need to soak black rice before cooking?
faqs.answer: Soaking is optional, but a short soak can help with softer texture and more even cooking.

faqs.question: Why does black rice cooking water turn purple?
faqs.answer: That colour comes from natural pigments in the grain's outer layer. It is a normal part of black rice cooking.
